entry.em: ..FLOOD WATCH REMAINS IN EFFECT THROUGH SUNDAY MORNING

entry.data:
MOSTLY CLOUDY WITH SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS LIKELY THIS MORNING, THEN PARTLY SUNNY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS THIS AFTERNOON
SOME THUNDERSTORMS MAY PRODUCE HEAVY RAINFALL
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
SOUTHWEST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 60 PERCENT

PARTLY CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS
SOME THUNDERSTORMS MAY PRODUCE HEAVY RAINFALL
LOWS IN THE LOWER 70S
SOUTH WINDS AROUND 5 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 40 PERCENT

SUNNY WITH HIGHS IN THE LOWER 90S
SOUTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH
HIGHEST HEAT INDEX READINGS HEAT INDEX READINGS UP TO 105 IN THE AFTERNOON

MOSTLY CLEAR
HUMID WITH LOWS IN THE MID 70S
SOUTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

SUNNY WITH HIGHS IN THE MID 90S
SOUTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH
HIGHEST HEAT INDEX READINGS HEAT INDEX READINGS UP TO 108 IN THE AFTERNOON

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE MID 70S

CLEAR, HOT
HIGHS IN THE MID 90S
LOWS IN THE MID 70S

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE MID 70S
HIGHS IN THE MID 90S
